name: How long do I have to appeal AI sanctions against my law firm in New York?
description: 30 days usually; file notice ASAP after sanction order.[1]

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to appeal AI sanctions against my law firm in New York?

acceptedAnswer.text: 30 days usually; file notice ASAP after sanction order.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Typically 30 days from sanction order entry under FRCP 11 or NY CPLR rules. Levidow lawyers faced unappealed sanctions for fake AI cases.[1] Key factors: order type (monetary vs. non), local rules, prejudice shown. File notice immediately, prepare record; consult appellate specialist. Missing deadline forfeits review.
